title: Riverside Family Residence
description: A 3,200 sq ft custom family home built from the ground up, featuring an open-plan living area, energy-efficient windows, and a landscaped outdoor deck.

title: Downtown Office Complex
description: Ground-up construction of a four-story, 40,000 sq ft commercial office building with underground parking and a glass curtain-wall facade.

title: Heritage Home Kitchen Renovation
description: Full gut-and-rebuild renovation of a 1920s kitchen, preserving original character while adding modern appliances, custom cabinetry, and quartz countertops.

title: Lakeside Retail Plaza
description: A 12-unit retail plaza with modern storefronts, ample parking, and sustainable drainage. Delivered two weeks ahead of schedule.

title: Modern Suburban Bungalow
description: A single-story 2,100 sq ft bungalow with a minimalist exterior, open kitchen, and a covered patio designed for indoor-outdoor living.

title: Industrial Warehouse Conversion
description: Conversion of a disused warehouse into modern loft-style office space, retaining exposed brick and steel while adding full HVAC and electrical systems.
